description_long: This is a single-bladed axe with a light wooden handle and a metallic head. The handle is slightly curved, providing ergonomic grip and leverage, and shows a natural wood grain texture. The axe head is made of steel, featuring a broad, wedge-shaped blade with a sharp edge and a flat poll on the opposite side. There are visible red stains, resembling blood, on the lower part of the blade, suggesting recent use or a dramatic context. The blade is securely mounted onto the handle using a traditional wedged fitting. No visible brand markings or labels are present on the axe.
description: A wooden-handled axe with a steel blade, featuring red stains on the blade and a slightly curved ergonomic handle.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from a side angle, highlighting the curved wooden handle and the steel blade with red stains near the edge.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the top, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the handle's rounded end.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the full length of the handle and the stained blade, similar to view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: The axe is seen from the bottom, emphasizing the alignment of the blade with the handle and the pointed end of the blade.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth, rounded cross-section and natural wood grain; ergonomic and traditional style.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad wedge-shaped steel blade with a sharp edge and flat poll; red stains on the lower edge; no beard.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fitting securing the blade to the wooden handle.
